originalTitle: Trump news at a glance: America wins ‘either way’, Vance claims amid shaky ceasefire with Iran
summary: Vice-president JD Vance says US holds all the cards in conflict with Iran – key US politics stories from Saturday 27 June
content: Hours before fresh military strikes were exchanged in the strait of Hormuz, vice-president JD Vance continued to reiterate the administration’s triumphant line on the war with Iran. “If we make the final deal, then great,” the US vice-president told HBO’s Bill Maher. “If we don’t make the final deal, their nuclear program is still destroyed. They’re still much weaker as a country, so my attitude is America wins either way.” The shaky ceasefire between the US and Iran is being increasingly tested, with more retaliatory strikes this weekend. President Donald Trump has also claimed the US has the upper hand. “There may come ‌a point when we are no longer able to be reasonable, and ‌will be forced to militarily complete the job that we very successfully started,” he posted to Truth Social in the wake of Saturday’s strikes. “If that happens,” he wrote, “the Islamic Republic ‌of Iran will no longer exist.” JD Vance claims US holds all the cards in Iran and will win ‘either way’ JD Vance said on Friday that the US wins “either way” regarding negotiations with Iran, pointing to what he called the destruction of its nuclear program and diminishment as a country. Vance said that the increased flow of oil through the strait of Hormuz was a “signal that there’s something real going on”. Read the full story US says it struck targets in Iran over ‘continued aggression’ against shipping The US military has launched further strikes on multiple targets in Iran, the US Central Command (Centcom) confirmed, a day after it had struck Iran in retaliation for a drone attack on a cargo ship in the strait of Hormuz. Centcom said its strikes on Saturday were in “direct response to continued Iranian aggression against commercial shipping”. The US strikes targeted “Iranian military surveillance infrastructure, communication systems, air defense sites, drone storage facilities, and minelayer capabilities”, Centcom said in a statement. Read the full story Appeals court rejects Trump EPA bid to abandon rule restricting deadly soot pollution A federal appeals court on Friday rejected the Environmental Protection Agency’s attempt to abandon a Biden-era rule that sets tough standards for deadly soot pollution. The unanimous ruling by a three-judge panel is a setback for the Trump administration’s deregulatory agenda and its repeated efforts to boost coal, a reliable but polluting energy source. Read the full story Trump says he will nominate Lance Schroyer as next ICE director Donald Trump said on ⁠Saturday ⁠that he ‌will ‌nominate ‌Lance Schroyer as ‌the next director of US Immigration ⁠and Customs Enforcement (ICE), succeeding David Venturella, who had been performing the duties of the director. Trump said in a Truth Social post that Schroyer “has over 29 YEARS of Law Enforcement experience in Oklahoma — A State where I WON all 77 Counties in 2016, 2020, and 2024! Lance is a former Oklahoma State Trooper, and United States Marine”. Read the full story What else happened today: White House unveils new images of US ‘patriot passports’ for America’s 250th Trump’s Board of Peace plans to grant itself sweeping immunity, documents show Trump threatens 100% tariff on European countries that impose digital tax Catching up? Here’s what happened on Friday 26 June.
chineseTitle: 特朗普新闻一览：万斯声称，在与伊朗的停火不稳定的情况下，美国“无论如何”都会获胜
chineseSummary: 副总统 JD 万斯表示，美国掌握着与伊朗冲突的所有牌——6 月 27 日星期六的美国重要政治故事
chineseContent: 在霍尔木兹海峡发生新的军事打击之前几个小时，副总统万斯继续重申政府在与伊朗的战争中的胜利路线。 “如果我们达成最终协议，那就太好了，”美国副总统告诉 HBO 的比尔·马赫。 “如果我们没有达成最终协议，他们的核计划仍然会被摧毁。作为一个国家，他们仍然要弱得多，所以我的态度是美国无论如何都会获胜。”美国和伊朗之间不稳定的停火正受到越来越多的考验，本周末将有更多报复性袭击。唐纳德·特朗普总统也声称美国占据上风。 “到了某个时候，我们可能不再能够保持理性，并且将被迫以军事方式完成我们非常成功地开始的工作，”周六罢工后，他在 Truth Social 上发帖称。 “如果这种情况发生，”他写道，“伊朗伊斯兰共和国将不复存在。” JD万斯声称美国在伊朗问题上掌握着所有牌，“无论哪种方式”都会获胜 JD万斯周五表示，在与伊朗的谈判中，美国“无论哪种方式”都会获胜，并指出他所说的伊朗核计划的破坏和作为一个国家的衰落。万斯表示，通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油流量增加是一个“信号，表明确实发生了一些事情”。阅读全文 美国表示，因“持续侵略”航运而袭击了伊朗目标 美国中央司令部 (Centcom) 证实，美军对伊朗多个目标发动了进一步袭击，一天前，美国对伊朗进行了袭击，以报复霍尔木兹海峡一艘货船遭受无人机袭击的事件。中央司令部表示，周六的袭击是“对伊朗持续侵略商业航运的直接回应”。美国的袭击目标是“伊朗军事监视”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
